warnings: Full Daisy-resummed thermal masses are not specified because they are not required by backend/semianalytic_pipeline.py.
lambda_HP and epsilon are not assigned numerical priors; downstream constraint work needs values or ranges.
Do not compare directly to m_ZD = 2 * g_D * M literature benchmarks without translating conventions.
Gauge dependence and supercooling/percolation caveats remain theory uncertainties for downstream FOPT/PTA analysis.
approximations: Use the minimal no-fermion gauge-dominated Coleman-Weinberg beta function.
Neglect portal and kinetic-mixing effects in the FOPT effective potential.
Use the semi-analytic backend rather than a full Daisy-resummed finite-temperature potential unless later requested.

global_symmetries.name: classical scale invariance
global_symmetries.notes: No explicit dark scalar mass term is present.

particle_content.name: A_prime
particle_content.notes: The Goldstone G is eaten after U(1)_D breaking.

lagrangian_terms.name: dark scalar kinetic
lagrangian_terms.notes: Gauge invariant for q_Phi = 1 and D_mu = partial_mu - i * g_D * A_prime_mu.

lagrangian_terms.name: dark quartic potential
lagrangian_terms.notes: Gauge invariant and classically scale invariant.

lagrangian_terms.name: optional Higgs portal
lagrangian_terms.notes: Gauge invariant; assumed negligible for FOPT dynamics.

lagrangian_terms.name: optional kinetic mixing
lagrangian_terms.notes: Gauge invariant; assumed negligible for FOPT dynamics but relevant for constraints.

free_parameters.name: v
free_parameters.range: to be scanned by downstream FOPT/PTA agents

free_parameters.name: g_D
free_parameters.range: g_D > 0; prior to be chosen downstream
free_parameters.notes: Dark gauge coupling in q_Phi = 1 convention.

free_parameters.name: lambda_HP
free_parameters.determination: optional phenomenological parameter; negligible for FOPT by assumption
free_parameters.notes: Needed for quantitative visible-sector constraints if included.

free_parameters.name: epsilon
free_parameters.determination: optional phenomenological parameter; negligible for FOPT by assumption
free_parameters.notes: Needed for quantitative dark-photon constraints if included.

g_D.description: U(1)_D gauge coupling in q_Phi = 1 convention.

assumptions: Minimal no-fermion dark U(1)_D Coleman-Weinberg model.
Dark and visible sectors have xi = T_dark / T_visible = 1 for the FOPT/PTA calculation.
Portal and kinetic-mixing effects do not alter the phase-transition potential.
The scalar quartic is dependent and must not be scanned independently.
Use q_Phi = 1 so that m_Aprime(chi) = g_D * chi.

backend_compatibility.notes: The model satisfies the conformal single-field selection rule. Warnings concern omitted full thermal masses and phenomenological portal values, not semi-analytic backend input.

ssb_pattern.notes: The charge-one scalar vev fully Higgses U(1)_D.

field_dependent_masses.notes: Derived from |D_mu Phi|**2 using real-vector mass-term normalization.
Tree-level scalar curvature; not passed as an independent semi-analytic backend input. The CW physical mass is beta_lambda * v**2.
Tree-level Goldstone curvature before gauge fixing/eating; not passed as an independent semi-analytic backend input.

thermal_masses.notes: The selected backend uses mass-over-vev ratios and degrees of freedom, not explicit Daisy-resummed thermal masses.
A full implementation would need scalar, Goldstone, and longitudinal-gauge thermal masses plus a gauge and resummation prescription.

expression_symbols.meaning: Dependent scalar quartic fixed by the Coleman-Weinberg relation.
One-loop quartic beta coefficient in backend convention.
